framework.name: MCP as Commerce Discovery Layer
framework.description: Visa adopted Anthropic's Model Context Protocol as the standard for agent-to-merchant communication, replacing web scraping with structured API endpoints. Merchants expose 'agent-ready' MCP endpoints; agents discover inventory/pricing through clean machine-readable data.
framework.raw_quote: A standardized API protocol that allows developers to 'plug' Visa's payment tools directly into the foundational structure of Large Language Models

source.title: Visa Intelligent Commerce: How Visa is Architecting the Era of Agentic ...
